SC-Villian-1.name: SC-Villian-1
SC-Villian-1.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="SC-Villian-1">
    <Request>
        <Set>
            <Verb>GET</Verb>
            <Path>/people/4</Path>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>backend1Response</Response>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <URL>https://swapi.dev/api</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

createJsonResponse.name: createJsonResponse
createJsonResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="createJsonResponse">
    <DisplayName>createJsonResponse</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://createResponse.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>

flows.condition: (request.verb = "GET") and (proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "") and (request.queryparam.filters = null) and (request.queryparam.universe = null)
flows.name: GET /villian-chain
